title: Landscape Blockout

video.note: Students build a castle environment in Unreal Engine while recording daily screen/camera evidence for a making-of documentary.

learningTarget: I can block out terrain forms for a castle environment and document how the terrain supports the route, focal point, and story.

bellRinger.prompt: What terrain features could make a castle feel protected, isolated, or dramatic?

vocabulary.definition: A dated record of what was built, what was captured, what changed, and what needs to happen next.
Video captured from the computer screen to show workflow, testing, or before/after changes.
Camera or screen-recorded evidence that shows how a project was made.
Supporting footage that helps explain a process, place, detail, or action.
The Q3 Unreal scene students build, refine, walk through, and document.

assignment.title: Castle Landscape Blockout
evidenceRequired: Top-down screenshot of the landscape blockout.
Player-view screenshot showing the route or focal point.
Daily screen recording showing a terrain/blockout decision.

exitTicket: What part of your blockout did you capture that guides the viewer toward the castle?
